title: G'tash
content:
Native to Mgdebdeb, the G'tash are a sapient species that can be found primarily in the galactic south, especially in the territory of the Tzenkian Empire. A physically imposing and long-lived species (upwards of 300 years), the G'tash evolved as the apex predator of their homeworld, although they are noted to have a much slower reproduction cycle than most species.

The G'tash were among the first species encountered by the Tzenki, although first contact was hardly on fair terms (as is often the case involving the Tzenki). The G'tash were roughly equivelent with Earth's Iron Age when the Tzeni first set foot on their planet, easily subjugating them and subsuming Mgdebdeb into the Tzenkian Empire. Their large stature and and physical prowess made them ideal servants to the Tzeni, quickly becoming the backbone of the empire's labor force. The G'tash were also employed as shock troops for the empire, helping the Tzeni conquer other species in much the same way they had been.
